subcodes.first_line: O thou who art searching for truth! Thy letter has been received. Thou has written that Agha Mirza Ahmed Khan Yazdani... Thou hast asked how it is possible to grasp the nature of life after death?
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متحری حقیقت نامه شما رسید مرقوم نموده بودی که آقا میرزا احمد خان یزدانی
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @relationship between government and people
